name: T2W3 Series Synchronous Alternator
description: T2W3 series three‑phase, 3‑wire star‑connected synchronous alternators with WT‑2 AVR. Rated voltage 400V, 50Hz, 1500rpm, power factor 0.8 (lagging). Designed to GB/T765 standards with compact mounting options (IMB34/IMB3) and damper windings for reliable performance.

dimension_specifications: {"Mounting":"IMB34 / IMB3 (foot & small flange options)","Frame Size Range":"180S to 355M","Note":"See catalog mounting table for A, B, C, D, E, etc."}
features: ["Automatic voltage regulation (WT-2 AVR)","High efficiency up to 92.8%","Stable output with low waveform distortion","Rugged design with damper windings","Flexible mounting (IMB34/IMB3)"]
applications: ["Diesel generator sets","Prime and standby industrial power","Mobile generator units","Construction and mining power"]
